task_description: Build a complete personal study system web app for a Bangladeshi college student. React + TypeScript + Tailwind + Zustand with localStorage persistence. Features: daily log input, smart to-do with list/board views, drag-drop Kanban, bulk actions, 3 trackers (college/tuition/self-study), spaced repetition revision system, exam management with countdown and exam mode, calendar integration, full UI customization (tags/columns/subjects/themes), college routine, and statistics. Mobile-first, deployed via Netlify.
